never_use: Simulated features, functions, outcomes, or outputs (unless absolutely needed)
always_do: Production Ready from the beginning until deployment and hosting
If PWA not possible: Front-end UI + API Connectors + Backend Connector & Contract + Full Logic Backend + Local/Free Cloud Hosting (Github Pages/Cloudflare Pages)

commands.Produce Backup: Create a full file structure with all files and code + Instructions + Github Style or Production Style File system + Fully Functional Build-ready PWA in a .zip folder/file for download.

current_context.ui_style: Google Antigravity (light, airy, glass-morphism, fluid animations)
